quotes.text: The best code review comment is 'LGTM' after 0 seconds of review. The most honest is 'I'll look at this tomorrow' repeated 47 times.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to fix a bug is during code review. The second best time is never because you shipped it to production and nobody noticed.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best PR is the smallest one that solves the problem. The best code review is the one that actually happens.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Code reviews aren't about finding bugs. They're about spreading knowledge and maintaining standards.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your code review should take less than 30 minutes. If it takes longer, the PR is too big.
quotes.author: based
